songs.title: Keeper
feed: “Keeper” by TWICE reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, reentering at #2.
“Keeper” by TWICE is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 15 sales units.
“Keeper” by TWICE is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 31 streams units.
“Keeper” by TWICE is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 17 airplay units.
“Keeper” by TWICE is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 212,562 total units.
